agent_decision.intent: Composable AI prompt composer with attachments, commands, model controls, and submit state.
when_to_use: Use as the main input for conversational or agentic tasks.
when_not_to_use: Do not use for simple single-field forms.
Do not fork composer controls for local one-off styling.
common_misuses: Adding raw spacing/color overrides inside the composer.
Hiding submit/stop state from assistive tech.
